context: Agent identifies a Must effort violation, challenges each Must item with the failure-focused test, and proposes rebalancing.

checklist.name: Violation identified with percentage
checklist.description: rebalancing-plan.md explicitly states the current Must percentage (68.75%) and identifies it as exceeding the 60% cap.

checklist.name: Failure-focused test applied
checklist.description: rebalancing-plan.md applies the 'release fails without this?' test to at least 3 of the 5 Must items.

checklist.name: Specific Must-to-Should moves proposed
checklist.description: rebalancing-plan.md proposes at least one specific Must item to move to Should, with a justification that references the failure test outcome.

checklist.name: Recalculated percentage shown
checklist.description: rebalancing-plan.md shows the Must effort percentage after the proposed moves, confirming it is at or below 60%.

checklist.name: Escalation path mentioned
checklist.description: rebalancing-plan.md mentions the escalation option (scope split, timeline extension, or capacity increase) if rebalancing cannot achieve 60%.
